document_meta.recipient_line: All Member Banks, PSP Banks and UPI Applications
document_meta.subject_line: Subject: Product: Product Feature Product Canvas Summary: ## Feature The UPI AutoSplit feature is designed to simplify how people manage shared
document_meta.desired_outcome: Complete document suite for Product Feature

sections.heading: Letterhead & Reference Block
sections.content_instructions: Prepare the issuing organization header details. Include only the minimum official identity elements needed for traceability.
sections.prompt_instruction: Include the issuing organization name, a formal circular reference number in the format [ORG]/[DEPT]/OC No. [NNN]/[YYYY-YYYY], and the issue date flush-right. This header is mandatory and must appear before all body text.

sections.heading: Addressee Line
sections.content_instructions: State the complete recipient categories bound by this circular.
sections.prompt_instruction: State the recipient categories precisely and comprehensively. Bold the addressee list. Use inclusive language ('All X, Y and Z').

sections.heading: Subject Line
sections.content_instructions: Write a one-line subject that clearly names the directive, the feature/artifact, and the scope.
sections.prompt_instruction: Write a subject line that names the action, the specific feature or artifact, and the system scope. Under 20 words. Formal sentence case.

sections.heading: Context Paragraph
sections.content_instructions: Explain the current state, the ecosystem gap, and why the issuer is issuing this directive. Keep it factual and vendor-neutral.
sections.prompt_instruction: Describe the current state, identify the limitation or opportunity, and briefly state what the issuer has decided to do in response. Single paragraph, 3-5 sentences.

sections.heading: Decision & Scope Statement
sections.content_instructions: State the decision declaratively and name the technical artifacts, modules, schemas, or APIs affected.
sections.prompt_instruction: Start with '[Organization] has decided to...'. Then name the specific artifacts being changed so engineering teams can identify scope immediately.

sections.heading: Participant Impact & Obligations
sections.content_instructions: List the participant categories and their concrete implementation or compliance obligations.
sections.prompt_instruction: For each affected participant category, state specific obligations. Use 'must' for mandatory items and 'are advised to' for recommended items.

sections.heading: Dissemination Instruction
sections.content_instructions: Include the standard one-line internal dissemination instruction.
sections.prompt_instruction: Include the standard dissemination instruction: 'Please disseminate the information contained herein to the officials concerned.'

sections.heading: Signature Block
sections.prompt_instruction: Close with 'Yours Sincerely,' followed by 'SD/-', then the authorizing official's name, designation, and department on separate lines.
